title: Silky Cucumber Stir Fry
description: A simple and refreshing Chinese-inspired stir fry made with silky eggplant, cucumber, and xtra vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced cucumber and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly tender.
Add the diced silky and xtra vegetables, and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the stir fry hot in a large bowl, garnished with additional cucumber slices if desired.
